description: Style NoteTalk about style and comfort, and there's nothing to beat this T-shirt from spykar. The graphic print adds unparalleled cool to this tee, team it with jeans and sports shoes and hit the road in style.Product DetailsWhite T-shirt with a round neck, short sleeves, graphic print on the front and brand tag appliqued on the left sleeveMaterial and Care100% cotton Hand wash in cold water using a mild detergentDo not soak or wringDry flat in shade and set shape when wetModerate warm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and shoulder 18") is wearing a size M
